name: Sarma
signatureDish: Black Sea cornbread; lamb kofte sliders
tips: A new day opens on Resy each morning at 10:00 AM ET, 30 days out; log in at 9:59 and refresh.
Walk-ins welcome at the 20-seat bar and high-tops, best right at 5 PM open.
Use Resy Notify for sold-out dates; parties of 7+ go through the private-events form.

name: Krasi
signatureDish: Lalagites (fried pancakes with thyme honey and cheese)
tips: VERIFY release time
Books up to ~3 months out; grab dates as soon as they enter the window.
Avoid Wednesday (Symposium wine nights) and weekend brunch for easier tables; try the bar as a weekday walk-in.

name: O Ya
signatureDish: Foie gras nigiri with balsamic chocolate kabayaki
tips: A new day releases on Tock at 12:00 PM noon ET, 90 days out, one day at a time; save your card and refresh at noon.
Prepaid reservations only, no walk-ins; max party of 6.
Flex on Tue/Wed and the 5:00-5:30 PM or 8:30 PM seatings; set a Tock waitlist alert for cancellations.

name: Wa Shin
tips: Reservations release daily at 12:00 PM ET, 14 days in advance; be online exactly at noon.
Michelin-recommended; only ~8 seats per seating, so parties of 1-2 find more openings.
Full prepayment plus 20% admin fee at booking; reservations are transferable.

name: Mamma Maria
tips: VERIFY release time
Book on SevenRooms the moment your window opens; prime Fri/Sat and window/outdoor seats fill first.
Target Mon-Thu for easier slots; email the restaurant for the private townhouse rooms for groups of 4+.

name: Giulia
tips: Standard parties open 14 days out at 10:00 AM ET (changed from midnight effective Jan 2026); be online at 10 sharp.
Can't get a table? The 18-seat bar takes walk-ins with the full menu.
The large-party pasta table books up to ~6 months ahead.

name: Contessa
tips: VERIFY release time
Major Food Group rooftop at The Newbury; tables vanish minutes after the drop (reported 10:00 AM ET, 30 days out).
Set Resy Notify and refresh for cancellations 24-48 hrs out; weekday lunch, 5 PM, and 2-tops are far easier.

name: Bar Vlaha
tips: VERIFY release time
Called one of the toughest tables in town; book about a month out, especially for parties of 4+.
Walk in to the bar (singles/pairs) at 5 PM open; target early-week or brunch.

name: Saltie Girl
signatureDish: Lobster rolls (warm and cold); the 'Secret' fried lobster roll
tips: VERIFY release time
Official site routes only to OpenTable; ignore the stale Resy listing.
Indoor is reservation-only but the patio is first-come walk-in; target Mon-Wed dinner.

name: Yvonne's
tips: VERIFY release time
Book via SevenRooms directly; the OpenTable listing is stale and not bookable.
Target Sun-Thu off-peak; card required for parties of 3+ Sun-Thu and all Fri/Sat. Try the bar for walk-up access.

name: Somaek
tips: VERIFY release time
Jamie Bissonnette / Michelin Recommended; the bar turns over fast and is a solid walk-in fallback, easiest on weeknights.
Set Resy Notify for the Fri/Sat 6:30-8:30 PM prime band; closed Sundays.

name: Fallow Kin
signatureDish: Wagyu bar burger; caramelized carrot with duck prosciutto
tips: VERIFY release time
Buzzy Oct 2025 opening in the old Craigie on Main space; the 10-seat prepaid chef's counter is the scarce ticket, so book it far ahead.
Bar (opens 4 PM, full menu) is first-come walk-in; use Resy Notify for cancellations.

name: Uni
signatureDish: The Uni Spoon (sea urchin, quail yolk, osetra caviar)
tips: VERIFY release time
Inside The Eliot Hotel; the 4-seat Thursday 'Take-Kase' omakase counter ($250pp) is the true hard ticket, so book it the moment a Thursday enters the window.
For a regular table, check OpenTable 1-2 days out for cancellations; call 617-536-7200 to confirm requests.

name: Carmelina's
tips: VERIFY release time
PLATFORM NOTE: actually books via Yelp Reservations (not OpenTable/Resy) at the link shown; online-only, no phone bookings.
Booked weeks-to-months out; enable Yelp waitlist alerts and book the instant slots open. Max party 6, 90-min seatings; weekday lunch or ~5 PM offers occasional walk-up bar seats.
